flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metropolitan Community College-Kansas City fell 92% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Metropolitan Community College-Kansas City rose 26% between 2006 and 2009 (14.8% → 18.6%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Metropolitan Community College-Kansas City rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (58.9% → 66.8%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Metropolitan Community College-Kansas City are 11% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($40.8k vs $36.9k).
